documentation_impact.rationale: This task changes feature-delivery runtime behavior, SDK invocation prerequisites, and operator-facing run guidance, so documentation and policy surfaces are impacted and updated in the same working diff.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: The work preserves human-gated stage advancement, avoids forbidden paths, and prepares ship-stage evidence without auto-advancing state.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: The task records governance rationale and documentation stewardship in a machine-checkable artifact, with explicit references to impacted operator and handbook surfaces.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: The implementation and test evidence align with PRD goals for reliable agentic pipeline execution with human accountability gates and observable validation output.
